title: Vaarallista vapautta
actors: Toivo Lehkonen, Pirkko Peltonen, Ville-Veikko Salminen
plot: The thriller Vaarallista vapautta (Dangerous Freedom) (1962), is based on Tuuli Reijonen's novel. Nurse Sinikka (Pirkko Peltonen) wants to help a prisoner (Toivo Lehkonen) who defected across the border from the Soviet Union. She ...
